offer: For restaurant accounting staff processing 10–20 invoices/month, inefficient manual processing causes delayed payments. We automate invoice batching instead of manual entry and scheduling of payments.
problem: Inefficient manual processing of vendor invoices leads to delayed payments.
channels_free: Post in Reddit communities for restaurant accounting help
Indie Hackers discussions on similar workflows
DM outreach to restaurant accounting staff with demo video
Community forums where accounting staff share tools
try_it: Let users try manual invoice entry and payment scheduling on 1-3 items
pay: unknown with a clear upgrade path
cheap_execution_checklist: 1-page landing page with the one-liner and CTA
Short demo video showing the manual-first workflow
Collect 10 short interviews from target users
Offer early-access onboarding for first 10 users
Post a weekly progress update in a relevant community
automation_simplification_ideas: One-click export of a simple report
